cpr-rolltable-dashboard.title: CPR Rolltable Dashboard
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.warning.systemMi: This module currently supports the Cyberpunk RED - CORE system only.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.cityEncoun: Street pressure, trouble, and environmental complications to drop into travel scenes.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.economyHel: Markets, sellers, clientele, danger, and economic pressure for Night City commerce.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.hustlesHel: Downtime work, role hustles, complications, trouble, and opportunities.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.locationsH: Street encounters, nightlife, shops, alleys, downtown blocks, and pop-up locations.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.factionsHe: Road gangs, city gangs, organized crime, cults, and other dangerous crews.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.corporateL: Corporate industries, civic bodies, net finds, job hooks, and scavenging tables.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.whatsHelp: Vendits and quick what-is-it generators for odd finds, vending machines, and scene details.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.netrunnerH: Side income, complications, and follow-up trouble for netrunner downtime.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.group.nightMarke: Locations, sellers, clientele, danger, and duration for a pop-up market.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.rank.label: Rank Band
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.period.label: Time
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.subtitle: Generate markets, encounters, hustles, and chained table beats without leaving the scene.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.sceneBuilderH: Fast prompts for improvising pressure, opportunities, and inventory at the table.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.economyHelp: Money, markets, vendors, supply, and street commerce.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.hustlesHelp: Role downtime, job fallout, and opportunity generators.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.streetHelp: Encounters, danger, and movement complications for live scenes.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.nightMarketHe: Build a market location with clientele, danger, seller, duration, and merchants.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.merchantHelp: Pull a vendor inventory from Cyberpunk RED core compendia.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.encounterHelp: Create a quick city complication for daytime or nighttime movement.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.hustleHelp: Resolve downtime with pay and possible complications.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.roleHustleHel: Choose a role, including Netrunner, then roll pay, complication checks, trouble, and opportunity as one chained result.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.factionHelp: Generate a complete gang, pack, organized crime outfit, or cult from its connected subtables.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.cityGangsHelp: Build a city gang or organized crime outfit from style, attitude, turf, goals, tactics, and regular hustle.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.roadGangsHelp: Build a road gang or nomad pack from style, attitude, travel range, goals, tactics, and hustle.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.cultsHelp: Build a cult or weird crew from style, beliefs, turf, goals, tactics, and regular hustle.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.locationHelp: Generate a complete place or scene by rolling each connected location subtable together.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.clubsBarsHelp: Generate a nightlife spot with entrance, appearance, clientele, owners, dangers, and security.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.bodegasHelp: Generate a bodega or shop with its location, description, and strange people inside.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.alleysStreets: Generate an alleyway, plaza, walkway, courtyard, or street-adjacent scene with secrets and surroundings.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.urbanEnvironm: Generate a busy downtown urban environment without pulling in Night Market tables.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.corporateLoot: Generate corporate industries, civic bodies, loot finds, job hooks, and vendit inventory from connected subtables.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.venditHelp: Roll the Vendit category, item count, and unique inventory items from the bundled vendit tables.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.ui.chainsHelp: Create repeatable multi-step rolls for recurring GM procedures.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.import.help: Create organized world RollTables for the bundled Dataterm content.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.import.success: Bundled rolltables imported into the world.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.import.alreadyEx: Bundled rolltables already exist in the world.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.table.emptySourc: This group is ready for future tables, but the source file is currently empty.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.result.title: Latest Roll
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.result.empty: Roll a generator or table to pin clean GM-facing results here.
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.encounter.title: City Encounter
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.hustle.title: Netrunner Hustle
cpr-rolltable-dashboard.vendit.title: Vendit Inventory
